reasoning: The document exhibits significant structural and content failures that preclude auto-approval. Specifically, critical 'Roll Call Vote' tables were converted to decorative images rather than accessible HTML tables, and a block of contact information (12 phone numbers) was omitted entirely. Despite high programmatic recall, these fidelity failures regarding board meeting data integrity require human intervention.

concerns.analysis: The 'NORTH CAROLINA 911 BOARD MEETING ROLL CALL VOTE' tables appearing on pages 4 and 6 of the source document are entirely missing as structured table elements in the output. They have been converted to images (element indices 26 and 32) and marked as decorative/decorative, resulting in a 100% loss of the data rows (member names and their respective vote records) which are essential components of the meeting minutes.
